twitter_thread: £9,999 in Tesco shares yields just £392 in passive income by 2027. A 3.9% return.
Dividend aristocrats like National Grid and British American Tobacco offer 10+ years of 4-6% dividend growth
An ISA wrapper can save £1,200 in taxes on £3,000 in dividend income, at 40% tax rate
15 high-yield stocks like Vodafone and GlaxoSmithKline can generate £5,000 in annual passive income
Reinvesting £1,000 in dividend income at 5% yield can grow to £1,628 in 5 years
Shares like Tesco can cut dividends, have you considered bonds like gilts or REITs like SEGRO?
What's your target monthly passive income: £500, £1,000 or £2,000? #passiveincome #financialindependence
pack.linkedin: A £9,999 investment in Tesco shares may yield just £392 in passive income by 2027, a 3.9% return.
